Branch IEEE JUIT Student Branch The IEEE JUIT Student Branch (IEEE JUIT SB) is an active chapter of IEEE, the world’s largest technical professional organization, at Jaypee University of Information Technology. It aims to provide a platform for students to enhance their technical skills, gain leadership experience, and contribute to the advancement of technology through various activities, workshops, and events. . IEEE JUIT SB includes three affiliated student branches: IEEE WIE JUIT SB (Women in Engineering) : Dedicated to promoting women engineers and inspiring more women to embrace engineering as a career path, the IEEE WIE JUIT SB aims to encourage gender diversity in technology and leadership. IEEE SIGHT JUIT SB (Special Interest Group on Humanitarian Technology) : Focused on applying technology for the betterment of society, IEEE SIGHT JUIT SB works on projects that address humanitarian challenges, promoting sustainable and impactful technological solutions for communities. EEE SPS JUIT SB Chapter (Signal Processing Society) : Focuses on advancing signal processing through research, publications, and technical events. It enhances students' skills and professional growth by providing resources and industry exposure. The branch actively organizes workshops, competitions, and events to foster innovation and collaboration in signal processing. Objectives of IEEE JUIT SB: Technical Skill Development : Organizing workshops, seminars, and technical events to provide students with hands-on experience in emerging technologies. Leadership and Teamwork : Offering opportunities for students to develop leadership and management skills through organizing and participating in various IEEE events. Industry-Academia Interaction : Facilitating interactions between students, industry professionals, and academicians to keep them updated with the latest trends and innovations in the technology sector. Community Outreach : Conducting outreach programs, including technical fests, hackathons, and other events to engage with the student community and promote a culture of innovation and collaboration. Global IEEE Network Access : Providing students with the opportunity to be a part of the global IEEE network, enabling them to participate in international conferences, competitions, and publications. ACTION PLAN - IEEE Student Branch, Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT): 1. Membership Engagement and Development Goal: Increase student membership and enhance member involvement in IEEE activities. Conduct an orientation session for new members to introduce them to IEEE and its benefits. Organize regular meetings to keep members informed about ongoing projects, events, and opportunities. Develop a mentorship program pairing junior members with senior members to facilitate knowledge sharing and skill development. 2. Technical Workshops and Skill Development Goal: Enhance technical skills among members and the broader student community. Schedule a series of technical workshops on emerging technologies (e.g., AI, machine learning, IoT, and software development). Partner with industry experts to conduct guest lectures and webinars, allowing members to gain insights from professionals in the field. Organize hands-on training sessions and hackathons to promote practical application of theoretical knowledge. 3. Event Organization Goal: Successfully organize major events that foster learning and collaboration. Plan and execute the annual tech fest  R&D Expo , including competitions, hackathons, exhibitions,ideaathon, and workshops Host the R&D Expo , showcasing student projects and research to encourage innovation and collaboration among students. Arrange inter-university competitions to promote networking and collaboration with other institutions. 4. Community Engagement and Humanitarian Projects Goal: Utilize technology for community improvement and social impact. < Initiate projects under IEEE SIGHT JUIT SB to address local community needs through technology-driven solutions. Collaborate with local NGOs to organize workshops or seminars focused on technology literacy and skill development for underprivileged communities. Develop a community service initiative encouraging members to volunteer for local projects, enhancing social responsibility among students. 5. Promotion of Gender Diversity in Technology Goal: Encourage female participation in engineering and technology fields through IEEE WIE JUIT SB. Organize events focused on empowering women in technology, including panel discussions , networking events , and career development workshops . Collaborate with female leaders in technology to provide mentorship and support for aspiring women engineers. Promote awareness of gender diversity issues through campaigns and workshops addressing the importance of inclusivity in technology. 6. Networking and Professional Development Goal: Facilitate networking opportunities between students and industry professionals. Host career fairs and networking events to connect students with potential employers and industry leaders. Develop partnerships with local industries for internships and job placements for IEEE members. Create a resume-building workshop to assist members in preparing for job applications and interviews. 7. Monitoring and Evaluation Goal: Regularly assess the effectiveness of the activities and initiatives. Establish a feedback mechanism for participants in events and workshops to assess their experience and gather suggestions for improvement. Conduct an annual review of IEEE JUIT SB activities to measure progress against goals and adapt strategies as necessary. Prepare a report at the end of the academic year summarizing accomplishments, challenges, and plans for the following year. Policy - IEEE Student Branch, Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT): The IEEE JUIT Student Branch (IEEE JUIT SB) operates with the goal of fostering technological innovation, professional development, and academic growth among the students at Jaypee University of Information Technology. The branch is aligned with IEEE's global mission to inspire technological advancements and connect the academic community with industry professionals . IEEE JUIT-SB includes two affiliated student branches: IEEE Women in Engineering (WIE) JUIT SB and IEEE Special Interest Group on Humanitarian Technology (SIGHT) JUIT SB , each working towards their specific missions. What is IEEE? The Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE) is the world's largest technical professional organization dedicated to advancing technology for the benefit of humanity. IEEE and its members inspire a global community through highly-cited publications, conferences, technology standards, and professional and educational activities. IEEE’s core areas of interest include electrical engineering, computer science, electronics, telecommunications, and other related disciplines. IEEE’s Mission : To foster technological innovation and excellence for the benefit of humanity. IEEE’s Vision : To be essential to the global technical community and to technical professionals everywhere, and to be universally recognized for the contributions of technology and of technical professionals in improving global conditions. About IEEE JUIT SB The IEEE JUIT Student Branch (IEEE JUIT SB) is a part of the IEEE Delhi Section , which is one of the regional sections under the IEEE Region 10 (Asia-Pacific Region) . The Delhi Section supports the activities of IEEE student branches across various institutions in the northern part of India, promoting technical activities and professional development opportunities for IEEE members in the region. IEEE JUIT SB, since its inception, has been dedicated to fostering an environment of collaboration, learning, and technical growth within the university. It provides a platform for students to engage in various technical and professional development activities. Objectives Promote Technical Development: Encourage students to enhance their technical knowledge by participating in workshops, seminars, hackathons, and other events related to engineering, innovation, and technology. Foster Leadership Skills: Provide leadership opportunities through roles within the student branch, allowing students to manage teams, organize events, and mentor peers. Organize Collaborative Events: Conduct technical fests, expos, and other activities that foster collaboration between students, faculty, industry professionals, and neighboring institutions. Encourage Diversity in Technology: Through IEEE WIE JUIT SB, promote gender diversity in the field of engineering by organizing specific events and initiatives that encourage female participation. Humanitarian Technology Initiatives: IEEE SIGHT JUIT SB focuses on using technology for the betterment of society, driving projects that address local community needs and global humanitarian issues. Facilitate Innovation and Networking: Provide a platform for students to network with industry experts, alumni, and peers through conferences, webinars, and IEEE-led initiatives. Key Elements Event Management and Organization: IEEE JUIT SB regularly organizes technical events, including hackathons, webinars, tech fests like Enigma and R&D Expo , and other innovation-driven programs to enhance technical and soft skills among students. These events aim to create a conducive environment for students to apply their technical knowledge in practical scenarios, fostering teamwork, problem-solving, and project management skills. Student Leadership and Involvement: Students can take up leadership roles such as Branch Chair , Design Team Lead , or other key positions that help them gain experience in managing teams, coordinating events, and guiding juniors. IEEE WIE JUIT SB and IEEE SIGHT JUIT SB provide platforms for students to engage in leadership roles with a focus on specific objectives like gender diversity and humanitarian technology. Collaboration and Innovation: Collaboration with other universities, industries, and IEEE chapters globally is encouraged to expose students to diverse technical communities and resources. Students are encouraged to work on projects that promote innovation and research, with the opportunity to present their work at IEEE conferences and publications. Community Engagement: IEEE SIGHT JUIT SB focuses on the application of technology to benefit society, encouraging students to design solutions for community challenges and participate in humanitarian projects. Regular workshops are held to raise awareness of current global challenges and to inspire students to develop technology-based solutions for them. Intellectual Property and Ownership Any intellectual property developed during IEEE JUIT SB-sponsored events and projects remains the property of the inventors. However, IEEE JUIT SB may use the innovations for furthering education, research, or outreach purposes, subject to agreements between the involved parties. Revenue Sharing and Sponsorship In cases where events generate revenue, such funds will be reinvested into the student branch to support further activities, workshops, and project funding. Sponsors and collaborators are encouraged to support IEEE JUIT SB initiatives through partnerships that enhance the student experience. Dispute Resolution Any disputes or issues arising from participation in IEEE JUIT SB events or activities shall be addressed through consultation with the student branch leadership, faculty advisors, or escalated to IEEE India Council as needed. In the case of sponsorship or intellectual property disputes, the involved parties will work with the university and IEEE leadership to resolve issues in alignment with IEEE’s Code of Ethics. Miscellaneous Amendments: The student branch reserves the right to amend this policy as needed, with approval from the faculty advisor and student branch executive committee. Use of IEEE JUIT SB Brand: The IEEE logo, along with the logos of IEEE WIE JUIT SB and IEEE SIGHT JUIT SB, may only be used with prior approval from the student branch leadership for branch-related purposes. Unauthorized use of these logos for commercial or non-IEEE purposes is prohibited.
